# ResumeSucks.com

> AI-powered resume critique and full rewrite. Brutal, honest, tailored to your target job.

## What it does

ResumeSucks.com analyzes your resume against a specific job posting and delivers:

1. **Free ATS Score** — instant keyword matching analysis, no cost. Shows a score (0–100), missing keywords, present keywords, and risk level.
2. **Full Roast ($9)** — paid report with 5 sections:
   - ATS Analysis (keyword gaps, formatting issues)
   - Brutal Roast (honest, no-sugarcoat critique)
   - Full Rewrite (complete resume rewritten for the job)
   - Your Wins (what's actually good)
   - AI-Proof Case (how to stand out in an AI-saturated hiring market)

## How to use it

- Go to https://resumesucks.com
- Paste or drag-drop your resume (PDF supported)
- Paste the job posting URL or description
- Get your free ATS score instantly
- Pay $9 to unlock the full roast and rewrite

## Key pages

- https://resumesucks.com — Main app (upload resume + job)
- https://resumesucks.com/result/:id — Results page (ATS score, full report)

## Pricing

- Free: ATS score
- $9 one-time: Full report (no subscription)

## Stack

Node.js / Express, Claude AI (Anthropic), Stripe, SQLite, Resend
